mapper.select:
SELECT monitoring.uasl_reservation_id, monitoring.uasl_id, monitoring.uasl_administrator_id,
monitoring.monitoring_information, monitoring.operator_id FROM t_monitoring_information as monitoring JOIN t_uasl_reservation as reservation ON (monitoring.uasl_reservation_id = reservation.uasl_reservation_id) WHERE reservation.end_at BETWEEN #{startAt} AND #{endAt}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_monitoring_information
uasl_reservation_id,
monitoring_information,
uasl_administrator_id,
operator_id,
uasl_id,
#{uaslReservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{monitoringInformation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{uaslAdministratorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{uaslId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.select:
SELECT uasl_reservation_id, monitoring_information, uasl_administrator_id, operator_id, uasl_id, operator_id, uasl_id FROM t_monitoring_information WHERE
uasl_administrator_id = #{uaslAdministratorId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
operator_id = #{operatorId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
uasl_id = #{uaslId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
EXISTS (select 1 FROM v_uasl_design_area_info_section WHERE v_uasl_design_area_info_section.uasl_id = t_monitoring_information.uasl_id and ST_Intersects(v_uasl_design_area_info_section.geometry, ST_GeomFromText(#{coordinates, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 4326) ) ) AND
t_monitoring_information.uasl_reservation_id IN ( SELECT t_uasl_reservation.uasl_reservation_id FROM t_uasl_reservation WHERE end_at BETWEEN #{startAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND #{endAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
